description: The SimplexNoiseClip component samples from simplex noise in order to get a pseudo-random frequency chart. Like a constantly random smooth changing whistle pitch.

fields.Duration: How long the clip is and its duration of how much of simplex noise it samples.
fields.Offset: Where in the simplex noise algorithm this clip starts sampling from.

methods.BakeClip: Turns the audio into a StaticAudioClip.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a ``Frequency`` and ``Amplitude``, then insert into a AudioClipPlayer to hear it.
